title: Dragonfly CO. LTD dragonflygame.com ransomware incident

extortion.description: Dragonfly is a South Korean video game developer and publisher based in Seoul. While a small company, it is notable for releasing many popular games both in Korea and globally including Special Force and Karma and still continue to release games both domestically and abroad. Besides video games, the company has also branched into other industries including biotechnology and webtoon publishing.
